title: Medical device shortage: 901053 Electronic Thermometer Probe Cover - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical device shortage: 901053 Electronic Thermometer Probe Cover
The 901053 Electronic Thermometer Probe Cover is currently reported as a medical device shortage through the Interim Order to help prevent or alleviate shortages in relation to COVID-19 . For a full list of shortages, refer to the medical device shortages: list of shortages .
Posted on June 15, 2020
